scope: Foundry V1 Unity package production and GitHub validation pipeline

admitted_claims: UPM is Unity's official reusable package system
Shared packages require manifests, assembly definitions when code is present, tests, documentation, changelog, and licensing
Recommended custom-package layout includes package.json, README, CHANGELOG, LICENSE, Editor, Runtime, Tests, Samples~, and Documentation~ as applicable
Editor, Runtime, Tests, and their imported contents require meta files
Package name and semantic version are required manifest properties
Dependencies use exact versions and samples declare displayName, description, and Samples~ path
Package tests live under Tests with test assembly definitions
Editor and Runtime test evidence remain distinct
Git package installs can select a repository subfolder and revision
A full commit hash provides an exact immutable package input
Workflows should use least privilege and treat untrusted contribution input cautiously
A full-length action commit SHA is the immutable action reference

non_claims: The sources do not define XR Foundry's maturity names or grant repository authority
The sources do not prove any XR device, renderer, runtime, input, or comfort behavior
A generated scaffold is not a Unity package implementation or release
